zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathew de la Hyde於大約1167年出生在英國波克夏丹華斯時，他的父親John de la Hyde I39歲，母親Lady Agnes28歲。他於大約1188年與Maud de Norbury結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1211年在英國爾海德享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathew de la Hyde于大约1167年出生在英国波克夏丹華斯时，他的父亲John de la Hyde I39岁，母亲Lady Agnes28岁。他于大约1188年与Maud de Norbury结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1211年在英国爾海德享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Hyde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or other of various places so called in Bedfordshire, Cheshire, Hampshire, and Middlesex. They were named with Old English hīd ‘hide (of land)’, a variable measure of land, differing from place to place and time to time, and seems to have been originally fixed as the amount necessary to support one (extended) family (Old English hīgan, hīwan ‘household’). The surname may also be topographic for someone living on (and farming) a hide of land. The Hyde family has been in Leinster, Ireland, since the early 13th century and one family has been established in the county of Cork since the 16th century. The name was Gaelicized as both Dalaithíd and de hÍde. Compare Hyder .

variants.name: Dollarhide
meanings: Irish: possibly an altered form of de la Hyde (see Hyde ), which was a prominent surname in Leinster from medieval times onward. Compare Dollahite .

History: Francis Dollahide, born c. 1650–60 in County Dublin, Ireland, was the ancestor of Americans with the surname Dollahide, Dollahite, and Dollarhide. In 1680 he was transported to MD for some youthful misdemeanor. He appears to have been an educated man and rose to be an important landowner and politician, serving in the Lower House of the MD legislature as an elected representative for Baltimore County from c. 1705 to 1721.

variants.name: Hyder
meanings: English (Kent and Sussex): status name or topographic name for one who lived on or possessed a hide of land, from Middle English hide + the locative suffix -er. This is a characteristically southeastern English name, synonymous with Middle English atte hide elsewhere (see Hyde ).

nameMeanings.name: Mathew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathew de la Hyde was born about 1167, in Denchworth, Berkshire, England, his father, John de la Hyde I, was 39 and his mother, Lady Agnes, was 28. He married Maud de Norbury about 1188. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died about 1211, in Hyde, Cheshire, England, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathew de la Hyde est né environ 1167, à Denchworth, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, John de la Hyde I, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Maud de Norbury environ 1188. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé environ 1211, à Hyde, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathew de la Hyde um 1167 in Denchworth, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de la Hyde I 39 und seine Mutter Lady Agnes 28. Er hat um 1188 Maud de Norbury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb um 1211 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Hyde, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathew de la Hyde è nato il circa 1167 nel Denchworth, Berkshire, England, il suo padre, John de la Hyde I, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Lady Agnes, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Maud de Norbury circa 1188. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì circa 1211, nel Hyde, Cheshire, England, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathew de la Hydeが約1167年にイギリスバークシュアイアデンチウオルスで生まれた時，父John de la Hyde Iは39歳，母Lady Agnesは28歳であった。約1188年にMaud de Norburyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は約1211年にイギリスチェシュアイアハイドで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathew de la Hyde(이)가 대략 1167년 영국 버크실르 덴ch워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de la Hyde I(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Agnes(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1188년 Maud de Norbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1211년 영국 체실르 히드에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1167–about 1211: tany ho any amin'ny 1167–tany ho any amin'ny 1211

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathew de la Hyde nasceu aproximadamente 1167, em Denchworth, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de la Hyde I, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Lady Agnes, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud de Norbury aproximadamente 1188. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1211, em Hyde, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathew de la Hyde родился около 1167 г. в местности денчворт, биркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de la Hyde I было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud de Norbury около 1188 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер около 1211 г. в местности хид, чешир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.

sm.about 1167–about 1211: e tusa o le 1167–e tusa o le 1211

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathew de la Hyde nació aproximadamente 1167, en Denchworth, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de la Hyde I, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Lady Agnes, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Maud de Norbury aproximadamente 1188. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1211, en Hyde, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años.
